title: Reader run 2026-05-13: candidate FY-Δgal80 library v1
description: First proper screen of the FY-Δgal80 candidate library off the H1 reader.

entries.title: 2026-05-13: reader run
entries.content:
First proper screen of the FY-Δgal80 candidate library off the H1 reader.

Plate setup:
- 80 candidates (columns 2 to 11)
- 8 WT negatives (column 1)
- 8 pDEMO-fluo+ positives (column 12)
- 12 empty wells with water for evap correction

Reader settings: 485/528 nm, 15 min cycle, 6 h total, 30 C.

Top-line numbers:
- Positive control mean fluorescence: 18,420 a.u. (SD 850, CV 4.6%)
- WT negative mean: 320 a.u. (SD 95)
- 14 candidates land above 5,000 a.u. (vs WT + 3SD); 4 above 10,000 a.u.

Next step: re-grow the top 14 from the deep-well plate, repeat the screen Thursday with technical triplicates. Will write up properly once the technical reps land.

comments.author: mira
comments.text: Strong first pass. The 4 above 10k look real to me; flag any of those that also grow faster than WT in the OD curve (the doubles are the prize). Save the reader CSV in the shared folder so I can poke at it before our 1:1.

comments.author: morgan
comments.text: @mira — should I prep the triplicate reps on the same H1 reader Thursday, or split across two readers to save a day? Either way works on my side; deferring to your call so the writeup methods section reads consistent.
